$description: Slide-deck-only spacing scale for sales collateral decks (pilot kickoff, customer 101, internal team, partner enablement). 16:9 master, 1280x720pt. Every gap has a floor AND a ceiling per the project rule that AI agents optimize toward maximums without bounds. Mirrors tokens/spacing/print.json conventions.

width.$description: Slide master width. 1280x720 (16:9) is the canonical Verdigris slide ratio. PowerPoint widescreen, Keynote 'Wide', Google Slides default all match.

top-min.$description: Slide top margin floor. Below this, the title block crowds the top edge.

top-max.$description: Slide top margin ceiling. Above this, the slide reads as half-empty.

bottom-min.$description: Above the footer band. Footer occupies 32pt below this.

height.$description: Footer band: logomark + page number + confidentiality marking. Fixed height across all slides for visual continuity.

padding-side.$description: Footer left/right padding matches frame side-min so footer aligns with content.

footer-height.$description: Logomark height in footer. Floor + ceiling intentionally tight; the rule (Z2O-1318) is consistency, not size variation.

title-slide-height-min.$description: Title slide may use a larger lockup; floor and ceiling still apply.

columns.$description: 12-column grid for slide content. Mirrors web/print grids; supports 1, 2, 3, 4, 6 column splits cleanly.

title-to-deck-min.$description: Slide title (eyebrow + headline) to deck/subtitle gap.

body-block-gap-min.$description: Vertical gap between body blocks (paragraphs, bullet groups, callouts).

cell-padding-y-min.$description: Table cell vertical padding floor. Below this, rows compress; readability suffers.

max-columns.$description: Hard ceiling on table columns per slide. Above 6, the slide cannot be read at projection distance.

max-rows.$description: Hard ceiling on table rows per slide. Above 8, split across slides or move to an appendix.

headline-min.$description: Slide headline floor. Below 32pt, headline competes with body for emphasis.

headline-max.$description: Above 44pt, headline crowds and limits to ~5 words. Use for one-word emphasis slides only.

body-min.$description: Body type floor. The 'persuade × slide deck' composition rule sets a 24pt floor for emphasis text; this 18pt is the absolute floor for non-emphasis body. Below 18pt fails projection legibility.
